content:
MODULE: cosmos.agents.specialization_learning
FILE: cosmos/agents/specialization_learning.py (624 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Agent Specialization Learning - Adaptive Skill Development

Novel Approaches:
1. Performance Tracking - Monitor success across task types
2. Skill Discovery - Identify emergent capabilities
3. Adaptive Routing - Route tasks to best-suited agents
4. Transfer Learning - Share skills between age

CLASSES:
- SkillLevel(Enum): Proficiency levels.
- TaskOutcome: Outcome of a task attempt.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- Skill: A skill that an agent can have.
  Methods: def success_rate(self) -> float
- AgentProfile: Profile of an agent's capabilities.
  Methods: def get_level(self, skill_id: str) -> SkillLevel
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- SkillTransfer: Record of skill transfer between agents.
- SpecializationLearning: Agent skill development and specialization system.

Features:
- Track agent perf
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def register_agent(self, agent_id: str, agent_type: str, initial_skills: Optional[dict[str, fl
  Methods: async def record_outcome(self, task_id: str, task_type: str, agent_id: str, success: bool, score: fl
  Methods: async def get_best_agent(self, task_type: str, available_agents: Optional[list[str]]=None, complexit
  Methods: async def get_agent_ranking(self, task_type: str, available_agents: Optional[list[str]]=None) -> lis
  Methods: async def transfer_skill(self, source_agent: str, target_agent: str, skill_id: str, transfer_rate: f
  Methods: async def apply_skill_decay(self)
  Methods: async def discover_emergent_skills(self, agent_id: str, min_success_streak: int=3) -> list[str]
